blended.narrative: Blacktail Mountain is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 6,108 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 12 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Thursday: 3.5" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect variable conditions.

recent_conditions.narrative: 14.0" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 37".
